title: Separate registration and profile changesets
prompt: Split MyApp.Accounts.User (fields: email, name, password_hash, bio) into two changeset functions: `registration_changeset/2` that casts [:email, :name, :password_hash] and marks all three required; and `profile_changeset/2` that casts only [:name, :bio]. Both should return an Ecto changeset. Write to lib/my_app/accounts/user.ex.
tier_rationale: Two named changeset functions. Easy because the split is described explicitly.
